description: Metadata-only manifest of the synthetic ACME corpus referenced by the benchmark's GT documents. The evaluator's built-in mock retriever does not need the actual document contents — it uses doc_id and filename from the ingested queries. This manifest is provided so a real retrieval system can be seeded with realistic-looking documents.

documents.description: Delegation of Authority Matrix v4 — spend approval levels by role.
ACME Procurement Policy 2025 — sourcing rules, tender thresholds.
Vendor Onboarding Playbook — KYC, sanctions, tax, risk scoring.
Third-Party Risk Framework — tiers, review cadence, exit plans.
Employee Expense & Reimbursement Policy — per-diems, receipts.
Global Travel Policy — class of travel, booking channels.
SOX Controls Matrix — key controls, control owners, frequency.
Revenue Recognition (ASC 606) internal guidance.
Capital Expenditure Policy v3 — thresholds, business-case template.
Operating Expenditure Management Guide.
Monthly / Quarterly Close Calendar — WD-1..WD-6 milestones.
Global Chart of Accounts — GL accounts and cost centres.
Annual Budget & Forecast Handbook.
Anti-Money Laundering Policy — screening, red flags, escalation.
Sanctions Screening Policy — OFAC/EU/UN lists, hit resolution.
Anti-Bribery & Corruption Policy — gifts, hospitality, FCPA/UKBA.
Gifts & Hospitality Register — thresholds and log.
ACME Code of Conduct.
Transfer Pricing Policy — intercompany transactions.
EU VAT Guidance — reverse charge, invoicing rules.
Treasury Policy — cash mgmt, FX hedging, counter-party limits.
Customer Credit Policy — limits, dunning, write-off.
Accounts Payable SOP — 3-way match, PO exceptions.
Accounts Receivable SOP — invoicing, collections, disputes.
Records Retention Schedule — retention periods by record type.
Internal Audit Charter — scope, independence, reporting.
Enterprise Risk Management Framework — risk appetite, taxonomy.
Key Risk Indicator thresholds — 2025.
Whistleblowing / Speak-Up Policy.
Employee Data Privacy Notice — GDPR/CCPA obligations.
